title: Bauer 39179 USB Rechargeable Personal Grooming Set | 4 Interchangeable Heads for Beard, Nose, Hair & Body | Ergonomic Handle | Travel Groomer
features: PERSONAL MALE GROOMING SET – This male grooming set is multi-functional and features 4 interchangeable heads to cater for beard maintenance, nose and ear trimming, sideburn shaping, and general body hair sculpting.

RECHARGEABLE GROOMING KIT – This beard trimmer features a high capacity rechargeable battery and has a USB charging outlet which lets you power up the shaver through your computer, power bank or car charger. One full charge takes 8 hours and will provide around 40 minutes of full power.

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE – This male grooming set is lightweight and compact making it the perfect size to be taken away on holidays, business trips, to the gym or anywhere else you would undertake your male grooming routine.

ERGONOMIC HANDLE – This male hair and body trimmer features an ergonomic handle which allows for a more comfortable shaving experience. The interchangeable heads on the shaver make it super easy to clean, and this set comes complete with a cleaning brush.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Bauer Professional is leading the way in the manufacturing of innovate and high-quality hair and beauty goods for both women and men. From shavers and beard trimmers to hair clippers and styling products, you can get all your male grooming needs at Bauer Professional. This personal male grooming set is multi-functional and a must have for any man looking for a thorough re-style on a daily basis. The set features 4 separate interchangeable heads that all conduct a different kind of grooming experience. There is a specific shaver for beard trimming, nose and ear trimming, sideburn shaping and general body hair sculpting. The beard trimmer runs off a rechargeable battery power source which has a USB cable and can be charged in the car, at home or in the gym. One full charge takes 8 hours and will provide around 40 minutes of full power. The personal groomer is lightweight and easily fits in a wash bag meaning it can be taken with you wherever you go. It also features an ergonomic handle which adds to the comfort when in use. Safety Warning Warning: Keep away from water. Do not use on children. Follow the cleaning and maintenance instructions. Use with caution to avoid injury from sharp blades. Keep out of reach of children.
